zh.Warburton, Cheshire, England, United Kin: 英國英格蘭爾瓦布爾頓
zh.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Warburton於大約1369年出生在英國英格蘭。她與Richard Warburton結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.Warburton, Cheshire, England, United Kin: 英国英格兰爾瓦布爾頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Warburton于大约1369年出生在英国英格兰。她与Richard Warburton结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Warburton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Greater Manchester (formerly in Cheshire) called Warburton, from the Old English female personal name Wǣrburg (composed of the elements wǣr ‘pledge’ + burh ‘fortress’) + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Warbritton
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Warburton  . This form of the surname is not found in English sources.

variants.name: Warbington
meanings: English (Lancashire): perhaps a variant of   Warburton  ; otherwise a habitational name from a lost or unidentified place.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Warburton was born about 1369, in England, United Kingdom. She married Richard Warburton. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Warburton est née environ 1369, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Richard Warburton. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Warburton wurde um 1369 in England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat Richard Warburton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Warburton è nata il circa 1369 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato Richard Warburton. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia.

ja.Warburton, Cheshire, England, United Kin: イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアワーブルトン
ja.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Warburtonは約1369年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた。Richard Warburtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Warburton(은)는 대략 1369년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Richard Warburton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Warburton nasceu aproximadamente 1369, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com Richard Warburton. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Warburton родилась около 1369 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Warburton. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Warburton nació aproximadamente 1369, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Richard Warburton. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.
